Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Seriously, getting drunk on cooking wine? That's damn pathetic, even for a deadbeat dad.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}But... So am I, I guess, for running out like this every day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Man... What am I gonna do now? I got nowhere to go.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}'Sup, pooch? You got nowhere better to be, either?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Sorry, bud, I don't got any food for ya.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Y'know, you look kinda familiar... Have I seen you 'round here before?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}Aw, why the long face? You sad we're in different homerooms now?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Nah, only thing sad here is your IQ.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Wait, ain't it way past your dorm's curfew? What're you guys doin' out here?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}Oh, you know, we snuck out. Once you're a second-year, you learn where the secret exit is.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}Anyway, we're headin' to Escapade to celebrate my guy here finally striking out. Wanna come with?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Whatever! I still have a shot![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}Heh, still in denial, huh? C'mon, face it, man. Yukari Takeba is way out of your league in the first place.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}I never expected her to hook up with that new transfer student right off the bat, though.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}Guess she's into the dark and mysterious type.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}I dunno, he seemed like a normal dude to me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}Nah, man. Get this—that transfer kid? Rumor has it both his parents died when he was younger.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}Someone got a peek at his file when Toriumi left it lying around.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Man, you're so gullible... That stuff only happens in soap operas.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}Hey, I did say it was just a rumor.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}Look, man, forget that—let's get going! I know a guy who knows a guy who can grab us some booze.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}Booze...? Uh, sorry, I... think I'm gonna pass.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}What? C'mon! Live a little why don'tcha—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}Dude, I already said no! I just... ain't in the mood.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}Well, looks like I'm the only one nursing your broken heart tonight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Dude, I'm telling you, I still have a shot![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Heh... Just had to turn 'em down. Today's really not my day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}Man... Wonder if I'll actually be happy with my life one day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}I wish I could like... change the world somehow.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}If only I could do something that no one else can do... Like, having some kinda special skill or power, you know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}I'm sure someday... Someday we'll be able to make real friends—friends who actually understand us.[n]{f 1 1}
